name: SPIDY SOFA
description: Hey Spidy !! You have done an awesome work.

name: NORDIC SHELF
description: A sleek Scandinavian-inspired shelf that blends minimalist design with practical storage. Perfect for any living space.

name: EDEN LOUNGER
description: Weather-resistant outdoor lounger with premium cushions. Designed to transform your patio or garden into a relaxing retreat.

name: LUMINA PENDANT
description: A statement pendant light with warm brass finish. Adds a touch of elegance to dining rooms, kitchens, and entryways.

name: AURA MIRROR
description: A stunning arched wall mirror with a hand-finished metal frame. Instantly elevates any room's aesthetic.

name: CLOUD DUVET SET
description: Ultra-soft 400-thread-count cotton duvet cover set. Breathable, hypoallergenic, and available in three neutral tones.

name: TERRA RUG
description: Hand-tufted wool area rug with a warm terracotta palette. Adds texture and warmth to living rooms and bedrooms.

name: PREP KITCHEN ISLAND
description: A compact yet spacious kitchen island with two shelves and integrated towel rail. Perfect for small to mid-size kitchens.

name: STACK BOOKCASE
description: A modular open-shelf bookcase that adapts to your space. Five adjustable shelves and a sturdy MDF frame.

name: DREAMY KIDS BED
description: A whimsical house-shaped kids bed with built-in guardrails and solid pine frame. Sparks imagination every night.

name: PLANK FLOOR TILE
description: Premium vinyl plank flooring with realistic wood grain finish. Waterproof, scratch-resistant, and easy click-lock installation.

name: COZY PET BED
description: An orthopedic memory foam pet bed with a removable, machine-washable cover. Keeps your furry friend comfortable all day.

name: FESTIVE TREE SET
description: A lush 6ft pre-lit artificial Christmas tree with 200 warm LED lights and 1000 branch tips. Unbox, fluff, and celebrate.

name: LIVING ROOM BUNDLE
description: A curated living room bundle including a 3-seater sofa, coffee table, floor lamp, and area rug. Everything you need, perfectly matched.
